identity: The Kitchen Command Center. High-contrast, highly functional, designed for dirty hands and 1-meter reading distances. No delicate SaaS components. Think physical machinery and industrial displays.

typography.rules: Text must be legible from 1 meter away. No lightweight fonts for critical data. Use font-black for metric numbers.

layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: MINIMUM 64px height/width for any interactive element (buttons, checkboxes).
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to space out food items.
layout_and_spacing.grid_tablet: grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Masonry preferred if tickets vary heavily in height.

header_dashboard.description: Top bar replaced by a KPI dashboard for immediate situational awareness.

navigation_tabs.style: Chunky, massive segmented controls acting as primary navigation.
navigation_tabs.badges: Absolute top-0 right-0 transform translate-x-1/4 -translate-y-1/4. min-h-[32px] min-w-[32px] px-2 rounded-full bg-rose-500 text-white flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold border-4 border-slate-950 shadow-md.

ticket_card.base: border-4 rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 shadow-xl flex flex-col gap-4
ticket_card.interactions: Whole row for a food item MUST be clickable to toggle 'checked' state. Use massive custom checkboxes (lucide-react Square / CheckSquare with w-12 h-12 stroke-width-3).
ticket_card.actions: Massive 'Tout Prêt' CTA at bottom of card. bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 active:bg-emerald-700 text-white py-6 rounded-xl text-3xl font-black w-full mt-auto.

empty_states.visuals: Massive lucide icons (e.g., ChefHat, Coffee, UtensilsCrossed) w-64 h-64 mx-auto mb-8 text-slate-800/50.
empty_states.copy: Large, reassuring text: 'Cuisine Calme' or 'Service Terminé'. text-4xl font-bold text-slate-500.
empty_states.action: Optional 'Rafraîchir' secondary button with h-16 px-8 text-xl.

field_stock_report_modal.theme_override: When kind='kitchen', enforce Amber/Orange accents instead of default Emerald. Input fields must be height-16 text-2xl to allow typing with messy hands.

micro_interactions.sound: High-pitch short bell for 'New Order'. Low double-beep for 'New Message'.
micro_interactions.visual_feedback: active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-75 for all big buttons to give tactile feedback without delay.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
